## Required Reading

- [ ] Re-read `README.md`
- [ ] Re-read `Package.swift`
- [ ] Re-read related client docs or issues

## Self-Review

- [ ] The change is shared-client logic, not app-specific UI behavior
- [ ] Public API names and model boundaries are intentional
- [ ] Encoding/decoding, endpoint behavior, or state changes are tested where relevant
- [ ] Follow-up work is listed or intentionally omitted
